title: Assorted Design Multicolor Monopoly Classic Clasp Coin Purse - 12.5cm x 10cm, 1 Piece (3 Assorted Designs) - Premium Collector's Accessory
features: MONOPOLY CLASSIC CLASP COIN PURSE: Own a piece of iconic game history with this premium collector's accessory, featuring the beloved Monopoly franchise in a fashionable and functional coin purse.
COMPACT & CONVENIENT SIZE: Measuring 12.5cm x 10cm, this coin purse is the perfect size to keep your coins, cards, and small items organized and easily accessible in your bag or pocket.

3 ASSORTED MULTICOLOR DESIGNS: Stand out from the crowd with a unique, high-quality Monopoly-themed coin purse available in three distinct, multicolor designs – collect them all or find your favorite!
TRADITIONAL CLASP FOR SECURE CLOSURE: Keep your valuables safe and secure with the classic metal clasp that not only provides a tight closure but also adds a vintage touch to the coin purse.

IINTRICATE GAME BOARD ARTWORK: Show off your love for Monopoly with this coin purse covered in detailed images from the iconic game, making it an ideal choice for fans, collectors, and as a gift for board game enthusiasts.
description: Indulge in nostalgia with our assorted design multicolor Monopoly classic clasp coin purse. Measuring 12.5cm x 10cm, it's an ideal size to hold your change, cards, and small essentials. Each piece features one of three exclusive designs, inspired by the timeless Monopoly game board, and is a collector's delight. These coin purses are crafted with care, ensuring a premium feel and durability. Whether you're a fan of the classic game, a dedicated collector, or simply in need of a unique accessory, this coin purse makes for the perfect pick. Experience a blend of practicality, style, and a touch of whimsy with every use.
